g.title: BOARD_S
g.text: basically board v1.3 J23/J27/J31/J35 - one cable per jack, x4 identical

g.title: S
g.text: S1-S4, qty 4. Gauge = GUESS (JST-PH contact limit). NOT straight-through, see crossover.

g.title: MOTOR_LEAD
g.text: mates the StepperOnline shipped motor lead, which interleaves the coils

g.title: CH
g.text: qty 1. Gauge = GUESS. Length = GUESS (copied from channel cables). Straight-through.

g.title: CH_LEADS
g.text: splice to chute stepper flying leads - find coil pairs with a multimeter first
